hero.title: Free Online

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.p1: All image resizing happens locally in your browser using HTML5 Canvas. Your images never leave your device.
privacy.p2: No uploads to any server. No storage. No tracking of your image content.
privacy.p3: Your privacy is 100% protected - everything runs client-side on your machine.
privacy.p4: Close the tab anytime. Your original images remain untouched.
privacy.notice: All processing happens in your browser, no uploads.

howTo.title: How To Resize PNG Image Online
howTo.step1Desc: Drop high-definition transparent PNGs or logos onto the target block. We process these safely via local memory.
howTo.step2Desc: Input target pixel heights or switch to percentage scales. Alpha channel masks will shrink beautifully.
howTo.step3Desc: Retrieve fully scaled visuals. If needed, toggle background layers directly into your outputs before downloading.
howTo.tipText: PNG format is perfect for logos and graphics with transparency. Use fill mode for exact dimensions, or enable aspect ratio to maintain proportions. Export to PNG keeps transparency, or convert to JPEG/WebP for smaller file sizes.

why.title: Why Resize PNG?
why.p1: Resizing PNGs helps deliver crisp UI graphics and logos at the right dimensions without bloating pages. Smaller, exact-size assets improve Core Web Vitals and SEO while preserving transparency.
why.tipText: Publish responsive images with exact sizes to reduce CLS and improve perceived performance.

platform.title: Perfect Size for Every Platform
platform.card1Desc: Whether replacing the background with custom RGB injections or retaining your masking, the alpha gradient never distorts.
platform.card2Desc: Hard icons and CSS web graphics scale beautifully without smudging your exact dimensional outlines.
platform.card3Desc: PNGs frequently swell. Lock the image down to exact layout bounds to massively trim Web-Vitals loading speeds.

qualityGuide.title: Quality vs Size Guide
qualityGuide.introPrefix: Different output formats produce different file sizes.
qualityGuide.introMiddle1: offers the smallest files, followed by
qualityGuide.introSuffix: Adjust the quality slider to see how it affects file size.
qualityGuide.recommendedDesc: Web images • Social media • Best balance

items.question: Do I lose PNG transparency when resizing?
items.answer: No. If you keep the output format as PNG, transparent backgrounds remain transparent.

items.question: What happens if I change the output format to JPEG?
items.answer: JPEG does not support transparency, so transparent areas will be replaced with a background color (default #ffffff).

items.question: Can I upscale a small PNG to a larger size?
items.answer: Yes, but upscaling may reduce sharpness. You can disable the Prevent upscaling option if needed.

items.question: Is this PNG resizer fully private?
items.answer: Yes. Resizing runs in your browser and your images are not uploaded to a server.
